mapper.update: UPDATE chat_room SET is_complete = 1 WHERE chat_room_id = #{roomId}
UPDATE chat_room SET is_complete = 1 WHERE chat_room_id = #{roomId}
mapper.select: SELECT cm.chat_message_id AS chatMessageId, cm.sender_id AS senderId, m.member_email AS senderEmail, IFNULL(rs.is_read, 0) AS isRead, -- 이 메시지를 안 읽은 사람의 수를 계산합니다. -- (이 채팅방의 전체 참여자 수 - 이 메시지를 읽은 사람 수) ( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_room_state crs WHERE crs.chat_room_id = cm.chat_room_id) - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM read_status rs_count WHERE rs_count.chat_message_id = cm.chat_message_id) ) AS unreadCount, cm.content AS content, cm.created_at AS createdAt FROM chat_message cm LEFT JOIN member m ON cm.sender_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN read_status rs ON cm.chat_message_id = rs.chat_message_id AND rs.member_id = #{memberId} WHERE cm.chat_room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY cm.created_at ASC

SELECT cm.chat_message_id AS chatMessageId, cm.sender_id AS senderId, m.member_email AS senderEmail, CASE -- 내가 보낸 메시지면, 상대방의 last_read_message_id 기준 WHEN cm.sender_id = #{memberId} THEN CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM chat_room_state crs2 WHERE crs2.chat_room_id = cm.chat_room_id AND crs2.member_id != #{memberId} AND crs2.last_read_message_id IS NOT NULL AND crs2.last_read_message_id >= cm.chat_message_id ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END -- 다른 사람이 보낸 메시지면, 내 last_read_message_id 기준 ELSE CASE WHEN crs.last_read_message_id IS NULL OR cm.chat_message_id > crs.last_read_message_id THEN 0 ELSE 1 END END AS isRead, cm.content AS content, cm.created_at AS createdAt FROM chat_message cm JOIN member m ON cm.sender_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN chat_room_state crs ON crs.chat_room_id = cm.chat_room_id AND crs.member_id = #{memberId} WHERE cm.chat_room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY cm.created_at ASC;
SELECT * FROM chat_room WHERE sos_id = #{sosId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT cr.room_name AS roomName, s.sos_type AS sosType, s.sos_id AS sosId, cr.is_complete AS isComplete, s.created_at AS createdAt, s.member_id AS ownerId, -- 현재 사용자의 마지막 읽은 메시지 ID (안읽은 메시지 수 계산용) crs_me.last_read_message_id AS lastReadMessageId, -- 상대방의 상호 bussiness_nm (bussinessName) ( SELECT b.business_nm FROM chat_room_state crs_ou JOIN business b ON crs_ou.member_id = b.member_id WHERE crs_ou.chat_room_id = cr.chat_room_id AND crs_ou.member_id != #{memberId} LIMIT 1 ) AS partnerName, -- 상대방 뱃지 ( SELECT m.badge FROM chat_room_state crs_ou JOIN member m ON crs_ou.member_id = m.member_id WHERE crs_ou.chat_room_id = cr.chat_room_id AND crs_ou.member_id != #{memberId} LIMIT 1 ) AS partnerBadge,
-- 상대방의 프로필 이미지 ( SELECT pi.storage_key FROM chat_room_state crs_ou JOIN member m ON crs_ou.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN profile_image pi ON m.member_id = pi.member_id WHERE crs_ou.chat_room_id = cr.chat_room_id AND crs_ou.member_id != #{memberId} LIMIT 1 ) AS partnerImage FROM chat_room cr -- 채팅방 참여자인지 확인 및 last_read_message_id를 가져오기 위한 JOIN JOIN chat_room_state crs_me ON cr.chat_room_id = crs_me.chat_room_id AND crs_me.member_id = #{memberId} -- SOS 및 Owner 정보를 가져오기 위한 JOIN JOIN sos s ON cr.sos_id = s.sos_id JOIN member owner ON s.member_id = owner.member_id WHERE cr.chat_room_id = #{roomId};
